73554.subject: Revolut is rebuilding its revenue mix before anyone sees the S-1 🤑🏦; OpenAI is paying for YC’s next batch in tok…
73554.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse400

👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed this week:
SpaceX IPO: Why the Biggest Listing in History Might Be Uninvestable at $1.75 Trillion [ https://substack.com/redirect/31a14fa3-750f-4cc9-9d57-7fc905538f48?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🪐 [ https://substack.com/redirect/31a14fa3-750f-4cc9-9d57-7fc905538f48?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The S-1 reveals a $7 billion Starlink profit machine subsidizing $30B in annual AI cash burn, while Elon Musk holds 85% of the vote with no sunset, no independent board, and no path to remove him]
Ex-OpenAI’s Aschenbrenner Bet $5.5B on AI Chips. Now He’s Betting $8.5B Against Them [ https://substack.com/redirect/82e3fd6b-fdaf-490c-8b9f-262ceea00916?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 💸 [ https://substack.com/redirect/82e3fd6b-fdaf-490c-8b9f-262ceea00916?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund Situational Awareness went from pure AI long to 62% short semiconductors in one quarter. Here’s what changed and why the thesis still holds]
Coatue’s May 2026 Report: The $12 Trillion AI Bet and Who Ends Up on the Wrong Side [ https://substack.com/redirect/8a04e68f-e321-4c13-a4dd-c81ce65b0819?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📊 [ https://substack.com/redirect/8a04e68f-e321-4c13-a4dd-c81ce65b0819?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Coatue’s latest public markets report reveals the most extreme winner/loser split in tech stock history, a $12 trillion AI capex wave, and one brutal framework that predicts exactly who wins]
Anthropic Just Told AI Founders Exactly What to Build in 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/40dc0987-84e4-48e0-9d53-20889b657345?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🦄 [ https://substack.com/redirect/40dc0987-84e4-48e0-9d53-20889b657345?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [1 million conversations. 9 consumer AI domains. A full founder playbook - plus where Anthropic’s own products will and won’t compete]
ChatGPT’s new personal finance feature is OpenAI’s bid to kill the fintech app economy [ https://substack.com/redirect/26346ada-6932-4c6c-875c-9086404c372a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖📲 [ https://substack.com/redirect/26346ada-6932-4c6c-875c-9086404c372a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]

73551.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-24-oleh-bezuhlyi-njivf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BfDISD7lqRbydEIhqhvEiBw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0FvNPZRwN1BIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpk290bs~6q-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpk290bs-6q
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: The SEC’s historic approval of Spot Ethereum ETFs marks a watershed moment for institutional adoption. Coupled with bipartisan legislative breakthroughs in the House, the industry is entering a new era of regulatory legitimacy and bullish maturity. 🏛️SEC Approves Eight Spot Ethereum ETFs in Landmark Decision In a massive regulatory shift, the SEC has approved 19b-4 filings for Ethereum ETFs from BlackRock, Fidelity, and others. This move effectively recognizes ETH as a non-security commodity and paves the way for imminent institutional trading. Read full story ⚖️FIT21 Crypto Bill Passes US House with Overwhelming Bipartisan Support The Financial Innovation and Technology for the 21st Century Act (FIT21) cleared the House with a 279-136 vote. This landmark legislation aims to clarify the jurisdiction between the SEC and CFTC, providing much-needed regulatory structure. See details 🐕Kabosu, the Shiba Inu Face of Dogecoin, Passes Away at 18 The legendary dog behind the "Doge" meme and the $20 billion Dogecoin ecosystem has died peacefully in Japan. Kabosu’s cultural impact on the crypto space is immeasurable, bridging internet humor with decentralized finance. Read tribute 🛡️House Passes Bill to Block Federal Reserve from Issuing a CBDC Lawmakers passed the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act to prevent the Fed from launching a digital dollar without Congressional approval. The bill was championed as a necessary protection for American financial privacy against government overreach. Read full story 🗳️Trump Campaign Officially Begins Accepting Cryptocurrency Donations Donald Trump has become the first major-party presidential nominee to accept crypto donations via Coinbase Commerce. The move underscores crypto’s growing influence as a pivotal political issue in the upcoming 2024 U.S. election. See details 💰BlackRock’s iShares Ethereum ETF (ETHA) Appears on DTCC Website Following the SEC's approval, BlackRock’s spot ether product has been listed by the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation. This technical milestone indicates that issuers are rapidly preparing for active trading pending final registration. Read full story ⚔️Uniswap Labs Challenges SEC, Urges Agency Not to File Lawsuit Uniswap Labs filed a formal response to the SEC’s Wells notice, arguing that the agency's attempt to regulate DeFi is a legal

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka
